Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of the value being verified
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
BigDecimalScaleVerifierImpl, PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl, PrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp
public interface PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,T>
Verifies the requirements of a primitive number (e.g. int).

  • Method Summary

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableVerifier

    isBetween, isBetweenClosed, isComparableTo, isComparableTo, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isLessThan, isLessThan, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isNotComparableTo, isNotComparableTo

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleNumberVerifier

    isMultipleOf, isMultipleOf, isNegative, isNotMultipleOf, isNotMultipleOf, isNotNegative, isNotPositive, isNotWholeNumber, isNotZero, isPositive, isWholeNumber, isZero

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs
